summary: Audit JSON has syntax error at line 52 — array entries in "server_plugin_system.files" use colons instead of commas
details: The audit file at docs/json/opencode/audits/plugin-security-manifest-audit.v1.json has a malformed JSON structure: line 52 has colon-separated entries in the "files" array where comma-separated key-value strings should be. This prevents the file from being parsed by standard JSON tools (jq, json module). Should be fixed by the audit author or a follow-up task.
